name: Colbor Wonder W60R RGB LED Monolight
description: Highly versatile in terms of portability, control, and power options, the Wonder W60R RGB LED Monolight from COLBOR has a camera-like, palm-sized design ideal for on-the-go creators.

features.Key Features :: For Content Creators & Vloggers | Output: 3520 Lux at 3.3' w/ Reflector | 2700-6500K CCT; Full RGB Color Control | AC Power; Accepts Optional Battery Grips | Supports PD USB-C Fast Charging | Onboard & App Controll; NFC Connection | CRI 97 | TLCI 99 | Quiet Fan Cooling | Portable Pocket-Size Design | Includes Reflector, Dome & Power Adapter
features.Standard Package: COLBOR Wonder W60R RGB LED Monolight | Mini Reflector | Power Adapter | Power Cord | Diffusion Dome | COB Cover Protector
